artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a squat iron strongbox on a worn card table, its lid embossed with curling scrollwork, a coin-slot mouth catching warm amber lamplight, a small brass key dangling from a chain; smoky brown shadow and ink-black gloom wrap the alcove behind it, the object glowing with quiet menace and a tender, melancholic sheen, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Favor Bank
text:
{T}: Target opponent gains 2 life and you create a Favor token. Deposits welcome. Withdrawals are someone else's problem.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice two Favor tokens: Draw two cards. The Favor Bank is not insured. The Favor Bank does not need to be.
flavorText: It pays no interest to depositors. It charges infinite interest to everyone else.
